outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources maintained full operational activity in the final quarter of 2021, with all observed pads active and a positive relative drilling delta of +3.0, driven by three newly active sites. This sustained activity supports stable production volumes near 68,000 boe/d. With WTI averaging around $70.93 and realized prices at a slight discount, revenue is underpinned by pure-play exposure to the core of the Permian Basin. The deterministic forecast of approximately $404M reflects continued operational consistency and solid drilling momentum into the quarter.
